initialValue:
name: Canary Orders API
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      image_digest:
        description: Tested image digest
        required: true
        type: string

jobs:
  canary:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: production
    steps:
      - run: ./scripts/create-codedeploy-canary.sh "${{ inputs.image_digest }}"
      - run: ./scripts/check-codedeploy-success.sh "$DEPLOYMENT_ID"
      - run: ./scripts/watch-canary.sh "$DEPLOYMENT_ID" --minutes 5

expected.label: workflow does not cancel an in-flight canary
canary runs under the production environment
first step creates the canary deployment
